# Ash Marshall — Corporate Video Director & Filmmaker (London)

> London-based videographer and director creating cinematic corporate films, brand content and music videos for UK and international clients. 28+ productions delivered for brands including Microsoft, HP and Gonvarri.

Ash Marshall is a London-based multimedia director who leads video production end-to-end — from concept and shoot through to edit, colour and delivery. Corporate and brand work is the core of the practice today, with a growing focus on music video direction.

## Services
- Corporate video production (case studies, product showcases, thought leadership)
- Brand & campaign films
- Music video direction
- Event, webinar & livestream video (Teams, OBS, studio & remote)
- Photography & design

## Selected clients & work
- Microsoft — Surface device showcases, Copilot workforce films
- HP — ProBook product films
- Gonvarri — Hackathon 2024 event film
- 28+ films in total across corporate, product and event work

## Craft & tools
Cinematography, lighting & gaffing, colour grading, sound mixing. Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, Cinema 4D, TouchDesigner, OBS.

## Location & availability
Based in London, United Kingdom. Available for commercial and creative briefs across the UK and internationally.

## Links
- Website: https://mars-hall.uk
